channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: GA on rAjarAja
item.description: Cheap-ass director of cheap-ass movies, Pa Ranjith, insults our great king rAjarAja chOzha as a robber of dalit lands. There is zero evidence for this assertion. On the contrary, although land was (and still is) recognized as belonging to the state, rAjarAja recognized the separate lands owned by paRaiyars (पऱैयर्-s), a caste well-recognized as dalit today and gave them tax-exemptions, along with Hindu temples & Jain monasteries; read on. Here are two inscriptions from the great shiva temple of tanjAvUr (तञ्जावूर्), the बृहदीश्वर.
